background.c(3) Library Functions Manual background.c(3)

NAME

background.c - Scalar ASCII background color rendering.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


char * image_print_color_background (const image_t *p, const char *palette)

Detailed Description

Scalar ASCII background color rendering.

Wrapper functions for scalar background color rendering. Uses background colors instead of foreground colors for output.

Definition in file background.c.

Function Documentation

char * image_print_color_background (const image_t * p, const char * palette)

Definition at line 15 of file background.c.

15                                                                           {
16   if (!p)
17     return NULL;
18   // For scalar, we use the color function which can be configured for background
19   // This is a placeholder for background-specific scalar rendering
20   return image_print_color(p, palette);
21 }




References image_print_color().
